homepage_content.heritage_title: A Sanctuary of Comfort in Singapore
homepage_content.heritage_paragraph_1: Regal Rivulet Retreat offers refined hospitality, modern comfort, and calm design for travellers visiting Singapore for leisure, business, events, and family holidays.
homepage_content.heritage_paragraph_2: Every booking is reviewed carefully by our team to ensure a smooth, secure, and personalised guest experience from arrival to checkout.

rooms.description: A spacious Singapore-style deluxe room with a king bed, warm lighting, work desk, smart TV, minibar, and calm city-hotel interiors.
A comfortable twin-bed room for friends or business travellers, designed with soft bedding, high-speed Wi-Fi, and modern bathroom amenities.
A premium room inspired by Marina Bay stays, offering elegant interiors, large windows, and a relaxing city-view atmosphere.
A quiet premium room with fresh decor, soft natural tones, queen bedding, and a peaceful garden-city inspired ambience.
A business-friendly executive room with a king bed, reading chair, workstation, coffee station, and upgraded bathroom facilities.
An executive twin room suited for corporate guests, featuring two beds, refined decor, premium linen, and fast connectivity.
A practical business room inspired by Singapore’s Orchard district, with a large desk, city-hotel comfort, and quiet sleeping space.
A boutique-style room combining modern comfort with subtle heritage design, perfect for guests who enjoy elegant details.
A family-friendly room with a king bed and sofa bed, ideal for parents travelling with children in Singapore.
Two connected rooms designed for families or groups, offering privacy, comfort, and flexible sleeping arrangements.
A stylish junior suite with a separate sitting area, king bed, premium bathroom setup, and a comfortable lounge feel.
A luxury suite inspired by Singapore’s Marina Bay skyline, with an elegant lounge area, premium bedding, and refined guest amenities.
A calm and spacious suite with river-city inspired design, living area, king bed, and luxury bathroom amenities.
A peaceful suite inspired by Singapore’s garden-city identity, designed with natural tones, soft lighting, and modern comfort.
A top-level luxury suite with grand bedroom, spacious lounge, dining corner, premium amenities, and VIP guest comfort.
A romantic suite for couples with soft lighting, king bed, relaxing bath amenities, and elegant Singapore city-stay ambience.
A thoughtfully designed accessible room with easy movement space, supportive bathroom features, and comfortable modern furniture.
A studio room suitable for longer Singapore stays, including a sitting area, work desk, storage space, and homely comfort.
A studio-style suite for business guests, offering a king bed, work area, lounge chair, fast Wi-Fi, and executive comfort.
The signature penthouse with luxury interiors, skyline-inspired ambience, spacious lounge, premium bedding, and exclusive VIP comfort.

about_page_content.story_paragraph_1: Regal Rivulet Retreat was created as a refined hospitality destination in Singapore, combining city convenience with peaceful luxury accommodation.
about_page_content.story_paragraph_2: Our team focuses on comfort, trust, service, safety, clean rooms, quality dining, and memorable guest experiences for every traveller.
about_page_content.mission_text: To provide elegant, secure, and personalised hospitality for every guest visiting Singapore.
about_page_content.vision_text: To become a trusted luxury retreat known for service, comfort, care, and Singapore-inspired hospitality.

team.name: Marcus Tan
team.bio: Over 15 years of experience in boutique hotel administration, guest care, and premium hospitality management in Singapore.

team.name: Alicia Lim
team.bio: Responsible for personalised guest support, smooth check-in experiences, and high-quality customer service.

team.name: Chef Daniel Koh
team.bio: Curator of refined local recipes, Singapore-inspired menus, and international fusion banquets.

team.name: Priya Nair
team.bio: Leads room cleanliness, linen quality, hygiene standards, and daily guest-room inspection.

facilities.name: Fine Dining Restaurant
facilities.description: Premium dining with carefully prepared Singapore local favourites and international dishes.

facilities.name: Luxury Spa
facilities.description: Relaxing wellness treatments, massage services, and quiet recovery spaces for hotel guests.

facilities.name: Rooftop Pool
facilities.description: A calm pool area for guests to relax after exploring Singapore.

facilities.name: Fitness Centre
facilities.description: Modern fitness equipment for business travellers and long-stay guests.

facilities.name: Airport Transfer
facilities.description: Pickup and drop-off support for guests arriving through Singapore Changi Airport.

facilities.name: Event and Banquet Hall
facilities.description: Elegant space for corporate meetings, private dinners, small weddings, and hospitality events.

facilities.name: 24/7 Security
facilities.description: Round-the-clock hotel safety, guest support, CCTV monitoring, and secure entry assistance.

facilities.name: Concierge Desk
facilities.description: Travel guidance, restaurant booking, local tours, transport help, and guest service support.

amenities.name: Free High-Speed Wi-Fi
amenities.description: Reliable internet access for all rooms, lobby spaces, meeting areas, and dining venues.

amenities.name: Luxury Spa
amenities.description: Relaxing wellness treatments for hotel guests.

amenities.name: Fine Dining Restaurant
amenities.description: Bespoke cuisine and premium guest dining.

amenities.name: Daily Housekeeping
amenities.description: Clean rooms, fresh towels, quality linen, and hygienic guest-room care every day.

amenities.name: Smart TV
amenities.description: Modern in-room entertainment with international channels and streaming-friendly access.

amenities.name: Air Conditioning
amenities.description: Comfortable room temperature control suitable for Singapore’s tropical climate.

amenities.name: Laundry Service
amenities.description: Laundry and pressing support for business travellers and long-stay guests.

amenities.name: Room Service
amenities.description: Convenient in-room dining and guest assistance during operating hours.

amenities.name: Safe Locker
amenities.description: Secure in-room storage for passport, money, jewellery, and guest valuables.

amenities.name: Coffee and Tea Station
amenities.description: In-room refreshments with coffee, tea, water, and basic guest supplies.

testimonials.review: Beautiful rooms, excellent service, and a very peaceful stay near Singapore’s main attractions.
The staff were polite, the room was clean, and the city-view atmosphere made the stay special.
The restaurant service was excellent and the room felt modern, quiet, and comfortable.
Good location, smooth check-in, helpful concierge team, and very clean housekeeping standards.
A lovely Singapore hotel experience with warm hospitality, nice dining, and relaxing spa service.

vacancies.description: Responsible for managing daily hotel operations, guest service quality, staff coordination, room readiness, and overall hospitality standards.
vacancies.requirements: Minimum 3 years hotel management experience. Strong leadership, communication, problem-solving, and guest-service skills required.
vacancies.benefits: Accommodation support, meals during duty, performance bonus, training, and growth opportunities.

vacancies.description: Prepare daily hotel meals, support Singapore local dishes and international menu items, maintain food quality, and follow kitchen hygiene standards.
vacancies.requirements: Previous cooking experience preferred. Must understand food safety, cleanliness, teamwork, and basic kitchen preparation.
vacancies.benefits: Duty meals, uniform, training, overtime as per policy, and career growth in hotel kitchen operations.

vacancies.description: Assist chefs with food preparation, washing, cutting, cleaning kitchen areas, storing supplies, and supporting smooth restaurant service.
vacancies.requirements: Basic kitchen knowledge preferred. Must be hardworking, clean, punctual, and able to work in shifts.
vacancies.benefits: Duty meals, uniform, staff training, service-charge eligibility, and growth opportunities.

vacancies.description: Welcome guests, take orders, serve food and drinks, maintain table presentation, and provide professional restaurant service.
vacancies.requirements: Good communication skills and polite behaviour required. Previous hotel or restaurant service experience is preferred.
vacancies.benefits: Duty meals, uniform, service training, tips or service-charge eligibility, and career development.

vacancies.description: Handle guest payments, restaurant billing, POS transactions, receipts, daily cash records, and basic guest billing support.
vacancies.requirements: Basic computer and POS knowledge required. Must be honest, accurate, polite, and comfortable handling payments.
vacancies.benefits: Duty meals, uniform, training, overtime as per policy, and growth opportunities.

vacancies.description: Clean guest rooms, change linen, refill amenities, report maintenance issues, and maintain hotel cleanliness standards.
vacancies.requirements: Housekeeping experience preferred but not compulsory. Must be physically fit, detail-focused, reliable, and able to work shifts.
vacancies.benefits: Duty meals, uniform, housekeeping training, overtime as per policy, and career growth.

vacancies.description: Monitor hotel entry points, support guest safety, manage incident reports, assist with emergencies, and maintain secure hotel operations.
vacancies.requirements: Security experience preferred. Must be alert, disciplined, polite, and able to work rotating shifts.
vacancies.benefits: Uniform, duty meals, shift allowance where applicable, safety training, and stable employment.

vacancies.description: Support cruise hospitality operations connected with Singapore travel, including guest service, cabin support, dining assistance, and onboard coordination.
vacancies.requirements: Hospitality experience preferred. Must have good communication skills, teamwork, discipline, and willingness to work on cruise schedules.
vacancies.benefits: Meals during duty, accommodation during cruise duty, training, travel exposure, and contract completion benefits.

vacancies.description: Maintain cleanliness in rooms, corridors, lobby areas, linen rooms, and public hotel spaces according to hotel hygiene standards.
vacancies.requirements: Must be reliable, physically fit, clean, punctual, and able to follow supervisor instructions.
vacancies.benefits: Duty meals, uniform, cleaning training, overtime as per policy, and internal promotion opportunities.

vacancies.description: Deliver guest items, food parcels, hotel supplies, and local delivery orders safely and on time within Singapore service areas.
vacancies.requirements: Must be punctual, polite, responsible, and familiar with local delivery routes. Valid riding or driving licence preferred if required by duty.
vacancies.benefits: Duty meals, uniform, delivery allowance where applicable, training, and growth opportunities.
